task.title: How to sum up numbers?
task.shortdesc: To sum up numbers using the JPS Calculator app, enter the first number, press the plus button, enter the second number, and press the equals button.

context.p: Follow these step-by-step instructions to calculate the sum of two numbers:

step.cmd: Enter the first number using the on-screen keypad.
Press the plus (+) button to select the addition operation.
Enter the second number using the keypad.
Press the equal (=) button to complete the calculation.

result.p: The final total appears instantly on the primary display screen.

taskbody.example: You want to sum up 2 and 3. The equation will look like: 2+3=5. You enter 2. Press plus. Enter 3. Press equals. The result 5 appears on the screen.
